reviews.review_description: So fun 🤩
The only game that works for several races a day) I have already changed several sets of batteries in a week and a half)

There are a few drums applications and games such as virtuoso and smash drums. Virtuoso is just to make your own songs, and smash drums is purely a rhymic game. This is right between the 2.
Graphically, it is ugly to look at. Game wise, it is too hard. You have to hit perfectly the notes, but if you hit extra notes nothing bad happened, making this an horrible flawed experience. 

So what is needed to this app? Better graphics/graphics, an option to not have to hit perfectly the notes, more songs... That's about all.

Real fun to mess around with and work on your actual drumming to an extent. You can work on basic skills but it has many limitations. 

I have no clue what’s going on with the songs as the ‘notes’ you’re supposed to hit are behind the drum set so you can’t even see them. Maybe it’s me but I don’t see a way to fix. As a game, I don’t even understand how it’s a game. It’s really just a virtual drum set with many limitations. 

I’d recommend to any new drummer looking to improve fundamentals or any drummer that for whatever reason can’t have an actual drum set. This will do until you get into the studio. I assume they are doing a lot of work because they are trying for a paid version… and I just don’t see it with this many flaws.

developer_response.body: Hey there, just wanted to get back to you on this and let you know that you can move both the drums, or the highway itself to get the exact positioning you want. If you switch to the menu mode, you can grab and move any drum and create your ideal setup. Likewise, there is a move button on the song window when you open a song that'll let you grab and move the highway around, even push it back or pull it forward using your thumbsticks. Let us know if this helps!

reviews.review_description: This app is awesome and I can’t wait to see what comes with the full release! Keep up the good work!
When I first installed it I ended up just messing around for 45 minutes! If you want a fun and replayable game I totally recommend this.

Love to play this game and learn a little drumming. with the note highway it can be easy to learn songs and has potential to become somthing like rocksmith for drummers. even that it is fun i realy would like to see some envoirment options like a stage or studio or something that would really make the experience more fun.

This is not a game - It Is a musical instrument on a head mounted display....and its absolutely, mind-bogglingly amazing. 

I was super skeptical at first, i suspected the lack of physical feedback/queues (not feeling a drum stick bounce off a drum skin for instance) would really limit/ruin the experience of drumming - Im glad to say i was wrong, it absolutely does not.

Obviously nothing will be on par with a real drum kit, but for the cost, convenience and functionality this package is as close as you can get and i would opt for this over an electric drum kit any day. 

I can now play some absolutely mad fills, slick beats and im not making anyone super angry while i do it.

The icing on the cake is that I can load my own (16bit wav) audio files and drum to my own music (i record/played guitar for 21 years)...

I believe i can even export my drumming as midi files....goodbye piano roll drumming and hello vr drumming, this has DRASTICALLY changed how i make music at home and its 100% for the better 

<3 THANK YOU PARADDIDLE DEVS YOU'RE THE BEST <3 <3 <3

reviews.review_title: Now I'll be Adding hours to oculus usage
reviews.review_description:
The way we can move the bass drum, high hats, snare, toms and cymbals around is the best feature I like. Little bit tweaking is required on the recenter option with respect to seat infront of snare position. 
Some basics: Can I sync my notes from good notes Or evernote Or drive etc which can be displayed wherever we want in the virtual space. 
Superficial requirement: A tap device in sync with oculus for both the foot thumbs i.e. left for closing high hats and right for kick.

My gateway back into music after becoming bedbound and disabled for a unknown amount of time.
It's been emotional and this means more to me than the dev or anyone else may ever know.
Cons: I want settings to be saved on exit and launch 
Pros: Literally everything else.
I cannot wait for a full robust release.
The game called me stupid because was not playing it said

developer_response.body: Hey there, I'm happy to help you out if you could elaborate on what issues you're having. Feel free to email me at emre@paradiddleapp.com, or post on our Discord (https://discord.gg/paradiddle), and we can help you out and get you drumming in no time!

reviews.review_description: I play drums irl so this is fun on a vacation
It's amazing and feel like you play it in real time

Second time out with this and after having read how it’s supposed to work compared to how it’s not working. Controllers not connecting beam out to objects on console. Nothing happens. Can’t create or adjust drum set. Or easily exit out..

If you have ever wanted to learn drums but cant afford a drum kit then this is a great place to start.

you can position drums anywhere you wish to suit your playing position and add a variety of different drums and most importantly, it has a cow bell. 

The songs are fun for learning although dont expect a simple experience like guitar hero or any of the rhythm games you find on quest, this is more like a tutorial on how to actually play real drum patterns. 

It is easy to pick up but difficult to master. 

this is a great tool for anyone who has wanted to play drums but cant afford it or dont have the space and I can imagine that experienced drummers can have a lot of fun with it too even if its just expanding the size of your kit. 

this app has lots of potential and I am looking forward to future updates!

i used to play guitar hero a lot as a teenager and i like the musical gaming concept, but in VR i think this works not only as a game but also as a good educational introduction to drumming. after having read the developper's responses to the comments before me, i'm giving it 5-stars. rock on dude \m/

….with space for improvment but with huge content. For now its a bit raw, the menue needs more love for details and the free drumming is not really accurat on faster beats. I‘m a real drummer and i like what i see, especially the Neal Peart-Setup and i‘m very excited what the future will bring. Keep going, you rock 🤘🏻
I play at least 10 songs per day to burn some calories and have fun!

Simply fantastic! Simple interface, great settings, works with wireless keyboards - you can use it as a kick drum on the floor;) Whether you have played drums so far or not, this application will surely entertain you!

reviews.review_title: Very Satisfied! Anxious to see more!
reviews.review_description: If there was a 10 star I would give it a 10/10 for features, accuracy, and just all around perfection. This app is obviously being done by someone who knows how a drum kit should sound and act. This app is by far the best drum app on the VR market and I have tried them all. I WILL be buying pedals for the kick drums and hihats just for this. Very satisfied. I am a drummer of 20 some years and I would really love to see how much more this can grow, but there is just so much greatness to it already! More features and additions would be the sugar rush of an already overly sweet and awesome product.
